purpose: Append-only progress log of planning and implementation work.

entries.title: Generated docs intent layer
entries.summary: Created PRD, technical requirements, user flows, design system, launch copy, and source normalization for Vouch.
entries.notes: Docs define human intent only and should not be parsed directly by implementation agents.

entries.title: Generated deterministic YAML contract layer
entries.summary: Created domain model, roles, authz, routes, features, analytics, and acceptance gates.
entries.notes: Contracts are intended to be the machine-readable implementation authority.

entries.title: Generated repo-level AGENTS.md guidance
entries.summary: Created Codex-oriented AGENTS.md instructions and 8000-character condensed variant.
entries.notes: AGENTS.md summarizes implementation rules, stop conditions, and reporting format.

entries.title: Generated instruction layer
entries.summary: Created domain-specific implementation instruction files using the requested legacy filenames and Vouch-safe normalized meanings.
entries.notes: Legacy terms were normalized: booking means Vouch lifecycle, guest means payer/client, host means payee/provider, discovery means public marketing and anti-discovery.

entries.title: Generated execution JSON seed files
entries.summary: Created initial backlog, decisions, progress, handoff, and validation state files.
entries.notes: Execution files record state and do not define business logic.

entries.title: Implemented Clerk auth foundation and authz helpers
entries.summary: Added Clerk-backed current-user resolution, local user sync with default VerificationProfile creation, server-side authz policies for admin/participant/invite access, Svix-verified Clerk webhook handling, idempotent webhook ledger use, and focused authz/webhook tests.
entries.notes: Focused authz/webhook tests and Prisma validation pass. Full typecheck/test remain blocked by pre-existing scaffold gaps outside this auth implementation.

entries.title: Implemented setup gates and verification readiness helpers
entries.summary: Centralized setup eligibility for create Vouch, accept Vouch, confirmation, and settings; added terms acceptance persistence; implemented setup page state and verification status/action helpers using provider references and statuses only.
entries.notes: Focused setup gate and return-path tests pass. Full typecheck/test remain blocked by repo-wide scaffold gaps unrelated to setup gates.

entries.title: Generated ChatGPT MVP onboarding audit
entries.summary: Created a takeover-oriented audit report summarizing source-of-truth files, current scaffold burden, MVP critical path, risks, stop conditions, and a ready-to-use ChatGPT onboarding prompt.
entries.notes: Documentation-only handoff artifact. No code validation was run.

entries.title: Restored Phase 0 validation baseline
entries.summary: Implemented contract validation, aligned PaymentRecord error fields with the domain contract, corrected Prisma client output and shadow DB config, and fixed current typecheck blockers in select/fetcher/action code.
entries.notes: pnpm prisma:validate, pnpm validate:contracts, pnpm typecheck, and pnpm test pass. pnpm lint still fails on existing scaffold no-explicit-any errors and copied Stripe sample code React lint errors.

entries.title: Made Stripe provider state authoritative
entries.summary: Consolidated Stripe provider helpers, moved authorization/readiness updates behind Stripe-confirmed state, restricted user-callable release/refund actions, implemented system expiration/reconciliation jobs, and updated webhook refund reconciliation to mark Vouches refunded on provider success.
entries.notes: pnpm typecheck passed after this work. Full lint/test were intentionally not re-run per launch/token-priority instruction; earlier lint was already failing on scaffold/sample-code issues.

entries.title: Finished backend gap wiring and server-backed route shells
entries.summary: Implemented notification email templates/provider/dispatch helpers, admin safe retry persistence and idempotent processors, cache/env helpers, and wired setup/payment/payout/verification/dashboard/Vouch/admin route shells to protected fetchers/actions.
entries.notes: pnpm typecheck, prisma:validate, validate:contracts, targeted Vouch tests, and lint pass. Lint passes with warnings. Stripe sandbox payment flows were not executed in this local run.

entries.title: Patched Stripe launch blockers found during dashboard readiness review
entries.summary: Allowed local Stripe webhook secret aliasing, made manual-capture PaymentIntent initialization return a client secret instead of failing before browser confirmation, and added release-time transfer to the connected payee account after capture succeeds.
entries.notes: Validation gates intentionally not run per user launch-token instruction. Browser Use attached to Stripe URL/title but DOM/screenshot bridge failed, so no live dashboard setting changes were made.

next_expected_work: Run sandbox create, payment confirmation, accept, dual-confirm, capture, and transfer flow.
Run sandbox incomplete confirmation expiration and void/non-capture flow.
Verify webhook endpoint URL and event subscriptions in Stripe live and sandbox.
Run final launch gates after sandbox proof.
